visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a middle-aged man wearing glasses, a grey flat cap, and a yellow t-shirt standing in a brightly lit indoor room. He looks directly at the camera and speaks with animated facial expressions, gesturing with his hands. A large graphic of a smartphone with a lock symbol is overlaid next to him, along with the title text. (2) As the man continues talking, the scene cuts slightly or shifts focus as text overlays appear one by one, listing different lockout durations like '1 minute', '5 minutes', and '15 minutes' alongside lock icons. He uses his index finger to point upwards or gesture toward these text elements. The background consists of light curtains and a wooden shelving unit. (3) The man introduces the first solution. A screen recording of an iPhone's Apple ID reset interface appears, demonstrating how to enter credentials. The man is shown in a small inset or the frame alternates between him and the screen recording. He points toward the phone to emphasize the on-screen steps. (4) For the second solution, the man gestures broadly as logos for iTunes and Finder appear on the screen. A new screen recording shows the 'Restore iPhone' prompt on a desktop interface. He maintains an enthusiastic expression while explaining the technical process of putting the phone into recovery mode. (5) The third solution is presented through a screen recording of the iCloud 'Find My' website. The 'Erase iPhone' button is highlighted. The man mimics a typing motion and continues his narrative, standing in the same indoor setting with consistent warm, bright lighting. (6) In the final phase, the man summarizes his advice, holding his smartphone in his hand and looking into the lens. A graphic for Face ID and Touch ID appears near his head. He points at the camera with a concluding gesture, advising viewers to remember their passwords.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Logo]: miko. [Slogan]: 密碼輸錯幾次 就會被鎖?. (2) [Variety]: 第六次錯誤 要鎖1分鐘. (3) [Variety]: 第七次錯誤 鎖5分鐘. (4) [Variety]: 第八次錯誤 鎖15分鐘. (5) [Variety]: 之後更久呢 就會被鎖住了. (6) [Slogan]: 解決方法一 Apple ID 重設 iOS 17之後. [Subtitle]: 點進去輸入Apple ID 就能直接重置 不用清空你的資料. (7) [Slogan]: 解決方法二 iTunes/Finder 連上你的電腦. [Subtitle]: 按iPhone進入 復原模式 用iTunes或Finder 點回復 整支清空、重新啟動. (8) [Slogan]: 解決方法三 iCloud 遠端清除 登入你的iCloud.com. [Subtitle]: 尋找iPhone功能 點選裝置後按清除 遠端就可以把資料抹掉 重啟設定. (9) [Subtitle]: 我跟你講密碼一定要記得啦 定期備份一下 用Face ID或Touch ID 減少輸錯機會. [Variety]: 減少輸錯機會.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting to the camera throughout the entire duration.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man with short dark hair, wearing thick-rimmed glasses, a grey newsboy/flat cap, and a bright yellow Roots Canada t-shirt. He has green and wooden bracelets on his left wrist.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A home interior or studio setting with translucent white curtains in the background. On the right, a wooden storage shelf is visible containing various items, under bright and warm artificial lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A clear, energetic male voice introduces the technical topic with high vocal arousal and a professional yet animated tone. Background music consisting of a synthesized, medium-tempo pop track starts immediately, featuring a consistent electronic beat. No ambient noise is audible. (2) A sharp 'pop' sound effect marks the first numeric detail mentioned about lockout times. The speaker's pitch variability is high as he emphasizes certain words, while the BGM remains at a lower volume to ensure vocal clarity. (3) Subsequent numeric details are punctuated by repeating 'pop' or high-pitched 'ding' sound effects. The speaker's delivery rate is fast but well-articulated, typical of a professional tech reviewer. (4) A digital 'whoosh' transition sound effect occurs as the speaker moves into the first solution. The BGM maintains its steady rhythmic pattern with synthesizer chords and light percussion without any pauses. (5) Each new solution introduction is preceded by a similar 'whoosh' or 'impact' sound effect. The vocal intensity remains consistent, and the signal-to-noise ratio is excellent, suggesting a studio-controlled environment. (6) The final summary is delivered with a slightly more relaxed but still authoritative tone. The BGM continues until the very end, accompanied by a final 'ding' sound effect as the speaker concludes his advice.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Problem Context -> Solution 1 (On-device) -> Solution 2 (Desktop) -> Solution 3 (Cloud) -> Best Practices -> Call to Action.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a practical tech tutorial to help iPhone users navigate device lockouts caused by incorrect passcode entries. It systematically explains the escalating lock durations and provides three distinct recovery paths depending on the user's available tools and iOS version, emphasizing data security and preventative measures like Face ID.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The presence of social media handles (@3ctim) and the 'miko' brand logo, along with the consistent presentation by a known tech influencer, indicates self-promotion and brand partnership.

high_inference.freeDescribe: This is a high-density, fast-paced educational short-form video. It effectively uses visual aids and sound design to keep the viewer engaged while conveying technical information clearly.
